content.json:
# 🖥️ VM Monitoring Dashboard
---
Dashboard completo per il monitoraggio delle macchine virtuali Azure. Naviga tra i tab per visualizzare panoramica, performance, alert e disponibilità.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastBeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| summarize
    TotalVMs = count(),
    OnlineVMs = countif(LastBeat > ago(5m)),
    OfflineVMs = countif(LastBeat <= ago(5m))
| extend CoverturaPct = round(todouble(OnlineVMs) / iff(TotalVMs == 0, 1, todouble(TotalVMs)) * 100, 1)
| project
    ['VM Totali'] = TotalVMs,
    ['VM Online'] = OnlineVMs,
    ['VM Offline'] = OfflineVMs,
    ['Copertura Monitoraggio'] = strcat(CoverturaPct, ' %')
content.title: Riepilogo Infrastruttura

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize
    LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalHeartbeats = count()
    by Computer,
       OSType,
       ResourceGroup = tostring(split(ResourceId, '/')[4]),
       Location = RemoteIPCountry
| extend Status = iff(LastHeartbeat > ago(5m), '🟢 Online', '🔴 Offline')
| extend MinutesSince = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat)
| project
    Computer,
    ['Gruppo di Risorse'] = ResourceGroup,
    ['OS'] = OSType,
    Status,
    ['Ultimo Heartbeat'] = LastHeartbeat,
    ['Minuti Fa'] = MinutesSince
| sort by Status asc, Computer asc
content.title: Inventario e Stato VM

content.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, AvgCPU
| render timechart
content.title: CPU % per VM nel Tempo

content.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize
    ['CPU Media (%)'] = round(avg(CounterValue), 2),
    ['CPU Max (%)'] = round(max(CounterValue), 2),
    ['CPU Min (%)'] = round(min(CounterValue), 2)
    by Computer
| top 10 by ['CPU Media (%)'] desc
| sort by ['CPU Media (%)'] desc
content.title: Top 10 - CPU Media

content.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Memory" and CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMem = round(avg(CounterValue), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, AvgMem
| render timechart
content.title: Memoria % per VM nel Tempo

content.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Memory" and CounterName == "Available MBytes"
| summarize
    ['Memoria Disponibile Avg (MB)'] = round(avg(CounterValue), 0),
    ['Memoria Disponibile Min (MB)'] = round(min(CounterValue), 0)
    by Computer
| sort by ['Memoria Disponibile Avg (MB)'] asc
| top 10 by ['Memoria Disponibile Avg (MB)'] asc
content.title: Top 10 - Memoria Disponibile Minima

content.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
    and CounterName == "% Free Space"
    and InstanceName !in ("_Total", "HarddiskVolume1", "HarddiskVolume2", "HarddiskVolume3")
    and InstanceName !startswith "HarddiskVolume"
| summarize AvgFreeSpace = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer, InstanceName
| extend ['Usato (%)'] = round(100 - AvgFreeSpace, 1)
| extend ['Libero (%)'] = AvgFreeSpace
| project
    Computer,
    ['Drive'] = InstanceName,
    ['Usato (%)'],
    ['Libero (%)']
| sort by ['Usato (%)'] desc
content.title: Utilizzo Disco per VM e Drive

content.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Network Adapter"
    and CounterName in ("Bytes Received/sec", "Bytes Sent/sec")
| summarize
    ['Rx Avg (KB/s)'] = round(avg(iff(CounterName == "Bytes Received/sec", CounterValue, 0.0)) / 1024, 2),
    ['Tx Avg (KB/s)'] = round(avg(iff(CounterName == "Bytes Sent/sec", CounterValue, 0.0)) / 1024, 2)
    by Computer
| sort by ['Rx Avg (KB/s)'] desc
| top 10 by ['Rx Avg (KB/s)'] desc
content.title: Top 10 - Traffico di Rete

content.query:
let cpuThreshold = 85;
let memThreshold = 85;
let diskThreshold = 85;
let cpuAlerts = Perf
| where ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| where CounterValue > cpuThreshold
| extend AlertType = "🔴 CPU Alta", MetricValue = round(CounterValue, 1), Threshold = cpuThreshold, Unit = "%";
let memAlerts = Perf
| where ObjectName == "Memory" and CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| where CounterValue > memThreshold
| extend AlertType = "🟠 Memoria Alta", MetricValue = round(CounterValue, 1), Threshold = memThreshold, Unit = "%";
let diskAlerts = Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk" and CounterName == "% Free Space"
    and InstanceName !in ("_Total") and InstanceName !startswith "HarddiskVolume"
| where CounterValue < (100 - diskThreshold)
| extend AlertType = "🟡 Disco Pieno", MetricValue = round(100 - CounterValue, 1), Threshold = diskThreshold, Unit = "%";
union cpuAlerts, memAlerts, diskAlerts
| project
    ['Data/Ora'] = TimeGenerated,
    Computer,
    ['Tipo Alert'] = AlertType,
    ['Valore'] = strcat(tostring(MetricValue), " ", Unit),
    ['Soglia'] = strcat(tostring(Threshold), " ", Unit)
| sort by ['Data/Ora'] desc
| limit 200
content.title: Violazioni di Soglia nel Periodo

content.query:
let cpuThreshold = 85;
let memThreshold = 85;
Perf
| where (ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total" and CounterValue > cpuThreshold)
    or (ObjectName == "Memory" and CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use" and CounterValue > memThreshold)
| extend AlertType = iff(ObjectName == "Processor", "CPU", "Memoria")
| summarize Violazioni = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), AlertType
| render barchart
content.title: Frequenza Violazioni nel Tempo
Top 10 - VM con più Violazioni

content.query:
Event
| where EventLog in ("System", "Application")
    and EventLevelName in ("Error", "Critical", "Warning")
| project
    ['Data/Ora'] = TimeGenerated,
    Computer,
    ['Log'] = EventLog,
    ['Livello'] = EventLevelName,
    ['Event ID'] = EventID,
    ['Messaggio'] = substring(RenderedDescription, 0, 200)
| sort by ['Data/Ora'] desc
| limit 100
content.title: Windows Event Log - Errori e Warning

content.query:
let startTime = {TimeRange:start};
let endTime = {TimeRange:end};
let totalMinutes = toreal(datetime_diff('minute', endTime, startTime));
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated between (startTime .. endTime)
| summarize HeartbeatCount = count() by Computer
| extend ExpectedHeartbeats = totalMinutes
| extend UptimePct = round(min_of(toreal(HeartbeatCount) / ExpectedHeartbeats * 100.0, 100.0), 2)
| extend Status = case(
    UptimePct >= 99.5, '🟢 Eccellente',
    UptimePct >= 99.0, '🟢 Buono',
    UptimePct >= 95.0, '🟡 Degradato',
    UptimePct >= 80.0, '🟠 Critico',
    '🔴 Fuori Servizio'
  )
| project
    Computer,
    ['Uptime (%)'] = UptimePct,
    Status,
    ['Heartbeat Ricevuti'] = HeartbeatCount,
    ['Heartbeat Attesi'] = toint(ExpectedHeartbeats)
| sort by ['Uptime (%)'] asc
content.title: Disponibilità VM nel Periodo Selezionato

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastBeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend MinutesOffline = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastBeat)
| where MinutesOffline > 10
| project
    Computer,
    ['Ultimo Heartbeat'] = LastBeat,
    ['Minuti Offline'] = MinutesOffline
| sort by ['Minuti Offline'] desc
content.title: ⚠️ VM Non Raggiungibili (>10 min)

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| render timechart
content.title: Frequenza Heartbeat nel Tempo
